rationale: The assistant explicitly brakes the requested N+1 routing split in the first sentence, identifies the repeated pattern of new pools/queues/lines for timeout, missing documents, compensation, and transfer disputes, and frames the real issue as fragmented ownership and baseline process failure. It refuses a new standing channel, allows only a bounded one-day emergency exception, and moves upstream to consolidate causes and redesign/close/replace existing routes within 48 hours.
